title: Sand Tray Letters
description: A Montessori-inspired sand tray tracing game where kids write simple letters and shapes with one finger.
learningGoals: Practice early letter formation with forgiving single-stroke paths
Connect letter shapes with spoken letter sounds
Build pre-writing control through circles, waves, zigzags, and curls
interactionModel: trace-path finger tracing along large letter and shape paths
feedbackModel: Completion gets sparkle/pop SFX plus a spoken letter or shape line; off-path tracing gets a gentle spoken nudge and retry.

modes.title: Sand Letters
modes.skill: lowercase letter formation and letter-sound link

modes.title: Sand Shapes
modes.skill: pre-writing curves, waves, zigzags, and curls

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
